room.caption: [WarshipE]
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(99)
global.partySplit=1
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1015) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode:
GID_SET(444779, self.id) image_yscale=9 image_index=1
if global.newMapX>=1024 {instance_destroy()}
